text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Today's the day! I just know I'm gonna win this time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah! I've trained so hard, and eaten so many carrots, how could I not be?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Although, I might've had a few too many carrots, hehe. I'm sure it's
fine!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So this is where you've been.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We're here to cheer you on, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: King! Spe! Thanks for coming, guys!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You trained with the mighty King Halo herself, you only have to go
out there and win now.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no problem! I'm definitely winning this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know you can do it! Just remember your training, and you'll soar
down the track!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Remember my training... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll just think of all the times you stuffed your face with snacks! Or the
time you tripped and got covered in mud!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't have to remember those parts of training!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The third tryout race will begin shortly. Runners, please make your
way to the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's me! I better get going!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Don't take your eyes off me, okay? See you after the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, Haru Urara's tryout race begins.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are racing through the dirt course, no doubt with the
Twinkle Series on their minds!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Now who's this bringing up the rear? Why, it's Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Could she be conserving her energy... doesn't look like it! She's giving
it her all, but she's still trailing behind the pack!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Urara!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Give it everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: Go, Urara, go!

text_block_list.name: Neighbor Lady
text_block_list.text: Show them what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who has had their spirits lifted by Haru Urara's infectious
optimism has gathered to cheer her on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the race reaches its conclusion...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
...And across the line! Our winner has finished, followed shortly by the
rest of the pack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will the ever-upbeat racer's hard work pay off at long last? Haru
Urara's final placement is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Ninth place! I've never done that well before!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Urara! That was an amazing race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Indeed. You gave it your all, right up to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's the exciting thing about races. You never know what's
gonna happen!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: Good job today, Urara. Here, these carrots are on the house!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yippee! This is just what I need to prepare for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Haru Urara finishes ninth out of ten runners.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, that takes care of the tryouts. What a blast!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I still can't believe it. Ninth place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But I just know I'll take first place next time! I can't wait until the next tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being so optimistic in the face of defeat isn't as simple as she makes
it look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's what makes Haru Urara so compelling to the people
around her... including me.
choice_data_list:
Then do you want to aim for first place with
me?

Then do you want to aim for first place with
me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're really gonna help me train some more?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Scouting me...?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! You want to recruit ME?! Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! Then that means I can run in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If I make my debut there, I'll be able to run in all sorts of races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And I'll get first place in every single one! Oooh, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for scouting me! I'll make it worth your while and win lots and
lots of races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decree, my journey with the endlessly optimistic Haru Urara
begins.
